message:
feat: phase gate expiry, async embedder support, MRL search, and metrics improvements

- canonicalize: stop replacing underscores with spaces during markdown
  stripping, since underscores are common in code identifiers and replacing
  them corrupts search queries for technical content
- config: add incomplete_embeddings field to TwoTierMetrics to track how
  many candidates lacked a quality-tier embedding during phase 2
- phase_gate: add configurable time-based expiry (default 1 hour) that
  resets accumulated evidence and any permanent SkipQuality decision if no
  observations arrive within the window, allowing recovery from transient
  quality-tier outages that would otherwise permanently lock out refinement
- searcher: detect API embedders (genuinely async) and await their futures
  sequentially instead of forcing them through rayon::join + poll_immediate,
  which would abort Pending futures; track incomplete_embeddings count
- two_tier: add Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) search fast-path
  that uses mrl_search with reduced dimensions when configured, enabling
  faster approximate search before full-dimension rescoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
